title: Fair Value Gap Trading Strategy | R2F Trading
seoTitle: Fair Value Gap Trading Strategy - Master ICT Concepts | R2F
seoDescription: Learn fair value gap trading strategy from ICT coach Harvest Wright. Master liquidity voids and price imbalances for profitable forex trades.
headline: Master Fair Value Gap Trading Like a Pro
subheadline: Discover how to identify and trade liquidity voids in the market using proven ICT concepts. Turn price imbalances into consistent trading opportunities.

keyPoints.title: Precise Entry Points
keyPoints.text: Fair value gaps provide high-probability entry zones where institutional traders create liquidity voids. Learn to identify these premium discount levels for optimal trade timing.

keyPoints.title: Market Structure Analysis
keyPoints.text: Understand how banks and institutions move price through liquidity gaps. Master the art of reading market flow and predicting where price will seek balance next.

keyPoints.title: Quick Gap Fills
keyPoints.text: Most fair value gaps get filled within 1-3 candles, offering rapid profit opportunities. Develop the skills to spot these setups before they happen and capitalize quickly.

keyPoints.title: Built-in Risk Management
keyPoints.text: Fair value gaps naturally provide clear stop loss levels and risk-reward ratios. Trade with confidence knowing your exit strategy before you even enter the position.

keyPoints.title: Multi-Timeframe Edge
keyPoints.text: Combine higher timeframe bias with lower timeframe fair value gaps for maximum accuracy. This approach filters out noise and focuses on institutional-level price movements.
